race.description: Mga Insurance Group Port Lincoln Cup Handicap
race.comment: Great to see a big field engaged for the Port Lincoln Cup. TYUSIX (14) returned with a bang off a long break at Strathalbyn back in December and has been very solid since - unlucky not to get the bob on two occasions. Strips rock-hard fit on the quick back-up and carries a feather. Bold showing anticipated. BURNING BRIGHT (6) was good when resuming in town on Jan 31 and then was good through the line second-up over 1400m. Finally steps out to a more suitable trip and should blend into race beautifully from her middle draw. JUST A BROTHER (15) charged home to score over a score over a similar trip earlier this month - finally capitalising on some strong chasing efforts. Has found winning form and gets in at the minimum. Expecting him to play a role. I'M A DEXSTAR (3) hasn't won for nearly a year but has been rock-solid this prep and deserves to break through. Is drawn favourably and will relish the trip. I NEED A DRINK (8) is always worth keeping safe.
